search_document:
User Request: Categories overview.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Category Distribution
Type: pie_chart
Description: Percentage of products in each category
Title: Top Categories by Sales
Type: bar_chart
Description: Categories with the highest sales volume
Title: Total Number of Categories
Type: kpi
Description: Count of distinct product categories
Title: Category Performance
Type: table
Description: Summary of sales and revenue by category

sql_queries.title: Category Distribution
sql_queries.description: Percentage of products in each category
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, COUNT(p.ProductID) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Products) AS Percentage FROM Categories c JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName

sql_queries.title: Top Categories by Sales
sql_queries.description: Categories with the highest sales volume
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, SUM(od.Quantity) AS TotalSales FROM Categories c JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY c.CategoryName ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 5

sql_queries.title: Total Number of Categories
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CategoryID) AS TotalCategories FROM Categories

sql_queries.title: Category Performance
sql_queries.description: Summary of sales and revenue by category
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, SUM(od.Quantity) AS TotalSales, SUM(od.Quantity * od.UnitPrice * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Categories c JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY c.CategoryName
